data_description.device_profile: Select the appropriate device profile for your Zendure system. The profile contains optimized control parameters.
data_description.soc_entity: Sensor providing the current battery State of Charge in percent. Central basis for all decisions.
data_description.soc_limit_entity: Optional sensor from the Zendure integration indicating active BMS limits (e.g. charge or discharge block).
data_description.pack_capacity_kwh: Usable capacity of a single battery pack in kWh. Multiplied by the number of installed packs to calculate total capacity.
data_description.capacity_entity: Optional sensor with automatically calculated available battery capacity in kWh. If set, it overrides manual calculation.
data_description.pv_entity: Sensor providing current PV power in watts. Used to detect surplus.
data_description.price_now_entity: Sensor providing the current electricity price. Enables price-based decisions.
data_description.price_export_entity: Sensor providing price forecast data. Enables intelligent planning.
data_description.grid_mode: Select how your grid consumption is measured: single combined sensor or split import/export sensors.
data_description.grid_power_entity: Single sensor: positive = import, negative = export.
data_description.grid_import_entity: Sensor providing current grid import power (positive only).
data_description.grid_export_entity: Sensor providing current grid export power (positive only).
data_description.ac_mode_entity: Select entity from the Zendure integration switching between INPUT and OUTPUT.
data_description.input_limit_entity: Number entity to set charge power in watts.
data_description.output_limit_entity: Number entity to set discharge power in watts.

reconfigure_grid.title: Configure grid measurement
reconfigure_grid.description: Select grid sensors according to the selected mode

data_description.grid_power_entity: Single sensor: positive = import, negative = export.
data_description.grid_import_entity: Sensor providing current grid import power in watts.
data_description.grid_export_entity: Sensor providing current grid export power in watts.

grid.title: Configure grid measurement
grid.description: Select grid sensors according to the selected mode

data_description.grid_power_entity: Single sensor: positive = import, negative = export.
data_description.grid_import_entity: Sensor providing current grid import power in watts.
data_description.grid_export_entity: Sensor providing current grid export power in watts.

data_description.device_profile: Select the appropriate device profile for your Zendure system. Control parameters are adjusted automatically.
data_description.soc_entity: Sensor providing the current battery State of Charge in percent.
data_description.soc_limit_entity: Optional status sensor detecting active BMS blocks.
data_description.pack_capacity_kwh: Usable capacity of a single battery pack in kWh. Multiplied by the number of installed packs.
data_description.battery_ac_power_entity: Sensor providing battery AC power. Value must be positive during discharge. Recommended: sensor.solarflow_2400_ac_bat_in_out
data_description.capacity_entity: Optional sensor with automatically calculated available battery capacity in kWh.
data_description.pv_entity: Sensor providing current PV power in watts.
data_description.price_now_entity: Current electricity price. Enables price-based discharge.
data_description.price_export_entity: Price forecast data for upcoming hours. Enables intelligent charge planning.
data_description.grid_mode: Determines how grid import and export are measured.
data_description.grid_power_entity: Combined grid sensor (positive = import, negative = export).
data_description.ac_mode_entity: Zendure AC mode (INPUT/OUTPUT). Controlled automatically by the integration.

state.expensive_discharge: Discharging due to high electricity price
state.very_expensive_force_discharge: Forced discharge due to extreme price spike
